arts.ttl: Another Barcelona star aims dig at VAR over disallowed Robert Lewandowski goal
arts.sum: Barcelona star Dani Olmo has this week joined the long list of those to have publicly poked fun at La Liga and VAR, over developments in the Blaugrana’s most recent…

arts.ttl: When is Portugal - Poland? how to watch on TV, stream online
arts.sum: The game between Portugal - Poland will be played on Friday November 15, with kick off at 2:45 p.m. ET / 11:45 p.m. PT. Poland needs to focus on a solid defensive setup to counter Portugal’s attacking prowess.

arts.ttl: Update: Bayern Munich’s João Palhinha withdraws from Portugal camp due to injury, could be out three weeks
arts.sum: Bayern Munich midfielder João Palhinha has withdrawn from the Portuguese national team due a groin injury. According to Sky Sport journalist Kerry Hau, Bayern Munich midfielder João Palhinha could miss three weeks:

arts.ttl: Palhinha leaves Portugal camp due to injury
arts.sum: Bayern Munich midfielder Joao Palhinha has been forced to withdraw from the Portugal squad.

arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes hails 'standout' quality in Ruben Amorim - and reveals what makes the new Man United manager a 'great character'
arts.sum: Bruno Fernandes (right) has hailed Ruben Amorim's (left) arrival at Manchester United and believes the club's new head coach will transform current fortunes at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Cristiano Ronaldo gets sharp response after publicly shaming team-mates
arts.sum: Cristiano Ronaldo took aim at his international team-mates as he accepted an award on Monday, much like England captain Harry Kane had done, and one of them has clapped back
